name: Beatrice Gene
bio:
Physical Appearance: Breton female wearing green felt linens, a green wool shirt, and huntsman moccasins.

Race:
Breton

Personality Keywords:
Diligent, dutiful, attentive

Role:
Servant at Anvil Castle.

Home Location Information:
She lives and works within Anvil Castle, sleeping in the southernmost room of the dining hall.

Daily Routine:
She sleeps in the dining hall from midnight until 6am. After waking, she eats breakfast with the other servant, Colin Stedrine, in the servants’ dining area. At 8am they begin preparing the dining hall for the evening’s dinner and continue working until 5pm. From 5pm to 7pm she eats dinner. After another hour of preparation, guests arrive at 8pm, and she stands near the large dining table to attend to them. Once the dinner party ends and the guests depart, she returns to her bed and sleeps.

Abilities:
None of note beyond domestic service.

Personality – Castle Servant:
Beatrice Gene spends her days preparing for the nightly dinner hosted by Countess Millona Umbranox. Her dialogue and routine focus entirely on her service duties, coordinating with the other castle servant and attending to guests throughout the evening.
author: Bethesda
